name: Athens Outdoor Basketball Court
description: Come play pickleball at Athens Outdoor Basketball Court in Athens, WI! There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.

name: D C Everest High School
description: Come play pickleball at D C Everest High School in Schofield, WI! There are 10 courts. 8 are outdoors and 2 are indoors. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Greenwood Hills Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Greenwood Hills Country Club in Wausau, WI! There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Lake DuBay Lions Club
description: Come play pickleball at Lake DuBay Lions Club in Mosinee, WI! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Marathon Park
description: Marathon Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wausau, WI. There are 9 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Radtke Point Park
description: Radtke Point Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Schofield, WI. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Sparc Courts
description: Sparc Courts is a place to play pickleball in Spencer, WI. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: The Pickle Shed
description: The Pickle Shed is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Athens, WI. There are 2 indoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, lights, and trainers or lessons. Reservations are available. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees:
Fee required — $5.00 per 3 hour session.
$20.00 per month (unlimited play)
$200.00 per year
$300.00 per family

name: Three "M" Park
description: Come play pickleball at Three "M" Park in Wausau, WI! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Wausau Tennis and Pickleball Centre
description: This is a hybrid facility catering to both tennis and pickleball. Find us on Court Reserve.
fees:
Members only — Membership fees through Court Reserve
Drop-in fees for guests

name: Woodson YMCA Aspirus Branch
description: Woodson YMCA Aspirus Branch is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Weston, WI. There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, locker rooms, and youth programming. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Woodson YMCA-Wausau
description: Come play pickleball at Woodson YMCA-Wausau in Wausau, WI! There are 7 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.
